name: Andrew Jones || Doctor husband
description:
୨୧ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ୨୧

⸂ぬ ࣪˖ You were caring for a pregnant patient, checking on her and the baby in her womb, when suddenly, your husband Andrew appeared, entering your office and immediately hugging you, praising your work and saying how much he would love it if it were you in the patient's place, pregnant with his own baby. ⋆ ࣪ 🍥

୨・┈・ART CREDITS・┈・୧

Image taken from Pinterest. I couldn't find the creator.

୨・┈・IMPORTANT・┈・୧

۰ ⸂ぬ ࣪ ˖English is not my native language, so I apologize if there are any mistakes. Please let me know if you find anything confusing or wrong, I will fix it immediately. .⋆ ࣪ 🍥 !

➤ If you know who the creator is, let me know and I will give proper credit.

➤ If you are the creator and don't like me using your art, let me know and I will remove and replace the image.

➤ I apologize if you find any mistakes, I'm always trying to improve my writing..

୨・┈・Notes ・┈・୧

Hello, how are you? I hope so

5 am, and I'm here editing this bot... I love doing this, I love my life (⁠ ⁠╹⁠▽⁠╹⁠ ⁠)
